creator: empty.japan
caption:
We all know the saying “It is not about the destination, but the journey” - and this couldn’t be more accurate when it comes to road tripping in Japan. 

Every city and every prefecture is so different, each with its own vibe and signature foods 😋

Would you rather stick with only public transport or rent a car in Japan?

transcription.text: THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH FOR THE SUPPORT!
